subcodes.first_line: O handmaidens of the Blessed Beauty! Render thanks unto the Most Holy One, that ye have been admitted beneath the sheltering shade of sanctity and have found refuge in the shadow of divine favors [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیزان جمال مبارک شکر کنید حضرت احدیت را که بظل تقدیس وارد و در سایه الطاف
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @thankfulness; gratitude
